name: LAMPLIGHTER

abilities.name: Don't Mind Me
abilities.text: The following do not restrict this model from declaring the Interact action: being engaged, leaving engagement with a Walk, and targeting a marker with an enemy in base contact.

abilities.name: Reactive Life
abilities.text: Once per activation. When an enemy model ends a move within 2" of this model, this model may gain a Life token.

actions.name: Lighting Stick
actions.effects: If this attack receives a raise, this model gains a Life token.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

actions.name: Light the Way
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp toward a piece of terrain or friendly Lamp marker in its LoS.

actions.name: Ancient Lamps
actions.effects: Make a Lamp marker within range. An ally within 2" of the made marker may heal 1.

triggers.name: Burn the Midnight Oil
triggers.text: This model may declare the Interact action, drawing range and LoS from the made marker.

triggers.name: Steel Monument
triggers.text: Declare the Light the Way action, which receives +(soulstone) to its Skl.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 based on 'Minion (3)' characteristic
